mainEntity.name: Cost comparison: In-house vs agency for Chicago AI Overviews optimization.
mainEntity.text: Cost comparison: In-house vs agency for Chicago AI Overviews optimization.

acceptedAnswer.text: In-house Chicago AI optimization costs $2,000-$5,000/month in time/staff; agencies $4,000-$12,000 with expertise but higher fees.

suggestedAnswer.text: Agencies offer proven tactics; in-house suits experienced teams. Chicago firms weigh against lead value—start in-house for testing.

name: In-House vs Agency Costs Chicago AI
description: In-house Chicago AI optimization costs $2,000-$5,000/month in time/staff; agencies $4,000-$12,000 with expertise but higher fees.
